value.title: OpenAI Just Signaled It Might Delay Its IPO. AI Stocks Are Tumbling. Is the Bubble Bursting?
value.summary: Could a delayed mega-IPO be the first crack in the AI spending boom?

value.title: Is The Growth Baked Into Advanced Micro Devices Stock Believable?
value.summary: The sticker shock on AMD shares fades when you look a few years out, but the real question is whether the company can deliver the growth that makes today’s price a bargain.

value.title: How Much Upside Can NVDA Stock's Growth Deliver?
value.summary: At $195.74, NVIDIA (NVDA) looks set up for roughly 51% of upside over the next three years under a conservative scenario. That is a move large enough to justify digging into where it comes from. Revenue compounding does the work, but the multiple takes a meaningful cut along the way. Here is the operational reality the math is built on.
